title: Bruegel, Hunters in the Snow
description: This is a quiz for the video Pieter Bruegel the Elder, Hunters in the Snow (Winter).

assessment_items.question_content:
**This painting was commissioned for a church to show the labors of the months.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**This painting was commissioned by a wealthy merchant in Antwerp for a domestic setting. The painting was part of a series of six that represented different times of the year.**

**[Watch this video to review](/humanities/art-history/art-history-1500-1600-end-of-the-renaissance-and-the-reformation/northern-renaissance/v/bruegel-hunters)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**One of the hunters carries a rabbit, showing the [[☃ dropdown 1]] .


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b55e52d8863d1ae28414066f7892497d.jpg)
hints:
**The hunters return from their hunt win a single rabbit, showing the scarcity of food in winter.**

**[Watch this video to review](/humanities/art-history/art-history-1500-1600-end-of-the-renaissance-and-the-reformation/northern-renaissance/v/bruegel-hunters)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**The tone of the painting is mixed. In the valley, people are playful while the hunters appear  . . .**


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/81b4152bddd1394784aa2a5da4399626.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**Having trudged home in the deep snow with only a single rabbit, the hunters are melancholic.**

**[Watch this video to review](/humanities/art-history/art-history-1500-1600-end-of-the-renaissance-and-the-reformation/northern-renaissance/v/bruegel-hunters)**

assessment_items.question_content:
**This is a landscape painting that is given meaning by . . .**


![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/81b4152bddd1394784aa2a5da4399626.jpg)

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
**The activities of the people who inhabit this town give this landscape meaning.**

**[Watch this video to review](/humanities/art-history/art-history-1500-1600-end-of-the-renaissance-and-the-reformation/northern-renaissance/v/bruegel-hunters)**

choices.content: the activities of the people who inhabit it.
the looming mountains in the distance.
the natural features of this town.
